notes: v1.14.88 - Redesign Step 2 cont. (Reference -> Hardware, part 2 = Cage Nut Compass): the Cage Nut Compass (pg-compass) is folded into Hardware as a 'Cage Nut' subtab. redesign_homeCompass() builds a stab on the re-homed Hardware strip + a #pw-compass block panel and moves the compass tool's content in (dropping its Back-to-Triage header - the subtab strip is the nav now). compass_render's one #pg-compass-scoped chassis-button query is made global so the tool works in its new home; goCompass() routes to the Hardware Cage Nut subtab in redesign mode. Flag-gated; field mode leaves pg-compass + its launcher whole. This COMPLETES Reference -> Hardware (pg-power pt1 in v1.14.87 + Cage Nut here). Reference tabs done so far: Optics, Hardware, Know. Remaining: CLI/IB (pg-cli), HW Ref.
